center.name: 海平面
center.summary: 海平面是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括桂红蜂鸟、White-fronted scops owl、恐鴞等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-and-white owl is mostly found in gallery forests and rainforest, but is also found in wet deciduous and mangrove forests, usually at an altitude between sea level and 2400 meters. Small ponds are also often visited by this species when hunting

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Cape eagle-owl is primarily found in mountainous regions or hilly areas with rocks where they find areas to roost, but can also be found in adjacent woodlands, grasslands, and wooded gullies. They are found from sea level up to 2,500 meters above sea level. These owls may also wander into human settlements or even towns, often specifically to prey on pigeons

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: ventralis (plain-breasted hawk), are found in upper tropical to temperate highlands; mainly at altitudes of , but occasionally down to near sea-level and up to

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Pratt|title=Birds of New Guinea: Distribution, Taxonomy, and Systematics |url=https://books.google.com/books?id=wRR1CwAAQBAJ&pg=PA226 |year=2016 |publisher=Princeton University Press|isbn=978-1-4008-8071-3|pages=226–227}} It primarily occurs in hill forests, but has been recorded from sea-level up to an altitude of 2400 m (7850 ft). The shovel-billed kookaburra finds its food in mud or on moist ground

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the west of Thailand and also in peninsular Malaysia. Its range covers of forest at altitudes of above sea-level

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is generally seen at elevations of up to above sea level, where it is found in tall lowland or hill forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Cinnamon hummingbirds are typically found at or just slightly above sea level, often inhabiting coastal and lowland areas, as well as further inland in warmer locations in the southern parts of their range
